reconciliation.horizontal: The initial focused vote split. After strengthening the complete-head horizontal translation and rotation, three fresh focused reviewers unanimously matched the hidden physical axis.
reconciliation.vertical: All three post-repair focused reviewers matched the unchanged vertical physical axis.
reconciliation.integrity: All three post-repair focused reviewers found eyes, brow, hair, monocle region, and equipment clean.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: increased horizontal head translation magnitude 2 to 3 and rotation magnitude 4 to 6
